title: Scripture Never Called Your Phone a Willpower Problem
caption:
You've tried the willpower approach. Delete the app, swear it off, last four days.

Scripture never told you to grit your way past a phone. It told you to renew your mind, not manage your habits.

Be transformed by the renewing of your mind. (Romans 12:2)

Here's what actually changes it.

#faith #christianmen #discipline #scripture #manofgod #godlymen
